translation.1) Click \"Open authorizatio: 1) Click "Open authorization page" and complete login. 2) Your browser may redirect to localhost (it is OK if the page does not load). 3) Copy the full URL from the address bar and paste it below. 4) Click "Generate credential".
translation.Additional metadata saved wi: Additional metadata saved with the log.
translation.API token name recorded on t: API token name recorded on the log.
translation.Automatically test channels: Automatically test channels and notify users when limits are hit
translation.Boolean fields can be writte: Boolean fields can be written directly, such as is_stream, or compared explicitly with true or false.
translation.Broadcast a global banner to: Broadcast a global banner to users. Markdown is supported.
translation.Broadcast short system notic: Broadcast short system notices on the dashboard
translation.Channel ID used by the reque: Channel ID used by the request.
translation.Channel name used by the req: Channel name used by the request.
translation.Choose how user special rati: Choose how user special ratios are applied after fallback when target-group pricing is used.
translation.Choose which administrator r: Choose which administrator roles can export call logs.
translation.Client IP address if IP logg: Client IP address if IP logging is enabled.
translation.Combine conditions with bool: Combine conditions with boolean logic and parentheses.
translation.Compare a field with a strin: Compare a field with a string, integer, boolean, nil, or date(...) literal.
Compare a field with a string, integer, boolean, or nil literal.
translation.Compare several model prefix: Compare several model prefixes in one search.
translation.Configure basic system infor: Configure basic system information and branding
translation.Configure currency conversio: Configure currency conversion and quota display options
translation.Configure custom OAuth provi: Configure custom OAuth providers for user authentication
translation.Configure daily check-in rew: Configure daily check-in rewards for users
translation.Configure Gemini safety beha: Configure Gemini safety behavior, version overrides, and thinking adapter
translation.Configure group ratios and g: Configure group ratios and group-specific pricing rules
translation.Configure io.net API key for: Configure io.net API key for model deployments
translation.Configure model pricing rati: Configure model pricing ratios and tool prices
translation.Configure outgoing email ser: Configure outgoing email server for notifications
translation.Configure predefined chat li: Configure predefined chat links surfaced to end users.
translation.Configure pricing model and: Configure pricing model and display options
translation.Configure recharge pricing a: Configure recharge pricing and payment gateway integrations
translation.Configure upstream worker or: Configure upstream worker or proxy service for outbound requests
translation.Configure user quota allocat: Configure user quota allocation and rewards
translation.Configure which groups to fa: Configure which groups to fall back to when the source group has no available channel.
translation.Configure xAI Grok model spe: Configure xAI Grok model specific settings
translation.Control log retention and cl: Control log retention and clean historical data.
translation.Control passthrough behavior: Control passthrough behavior and connection keep-alive settings
translation.Control request frequency to: Control request frequency to prevent abuse and manage system load.
translation.Control which sidebar areas: Control which sidebar areas and modules are available to all users.
translation.Creation time as a Unix time: Creation time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
translation.Creation time as Unix second: Creation time as Unix seconds; date(...) is also accepted.
translation.Curate quick links to your d: Curate quick links to your different Domains
translation.Enable or disable top naviga: Enable or disable top navigation modules globally.
translation.Expose grouped Uptime Kuma s: Expose grouped Uptime Kuma status pages directly on the dashboard
translation.Expression search is parsed: Expression search is parsed from the AST and translated into SQL with an allowed field list, placeholders, and escaped LIKE patterns.
translation.Expression search, e.g. mode: Expression search, e.g. model_name contains "gpt" && type == 2
translation.Expressions are limited to 4: Expressions are limited to 4096 characters, string literals to 1024 characters, and in arrays to 100 items.
translation.Find calls with unusually la: Find calls with unusually large input or output token counts.
translation.Find consumption records for: Find consumption records for GPT-family models.
translation.Find logs that have a token: Find logs that have a token name after a readable date.
Find logs that have a token name after a timestamp.
translation.Find matching model logs fro: Find matching model logs from the current local day.
translation.Find records from one of sev: Find records from one of several groups.
translation.Find requests recorded from: Find requests recorded from one client IP address.
translation.Find streamed requests for C: Find streamed requests for Claude-family models.
translation.For admins, filter by channe: For admins, filter by channel name and log type.
translation.For admins, filter one user: For admins, filter one user on a numeric channel ID.
translation.Generate a Codex OAuth crede: Generate a Codex OAuth credential and paste it into the channel key field.
translation.JSON map of group name to fa: JSON map of group name to fallback config. When a group has no available channel, the system tries fallback groups in order. Use pricing_mode "origin" to bill at source group rate, or "target" to bill at serving group rate.
translation.Jump to a single traced requ: Jump to a single traced request.
translation.Keep normal consumption logs: Keep normal consumption logs while hiding embedding calls.
translation.Log type code: 1 top-up, 2 c: Log type code: 1 top-up, 2 consume, 3 manage, 4 system, 5 error, 6 refund.
translation.Look for timeout messages or: Look for timeout messages or upstream rate-limit metadata.
translation.Main log content or error me: Main log content or error message text.
translation.Maintain a list of common qu: Maintain a list of common questions for the dashboard help panel
translation.Manage API channels and prov: Manage API channels and provider configurations
translation.Manage redemption codes for: Manage redemption codes for quota top-up
translation.Manage subscription plan cre: Manage subscription plan creation, pricing and status
translation.Manage your API keys for acc: Manage your API keys for accessing the service
translation.Manage your balance and paym: Manage your balance and payment methods
translation.Match a field against a lite: Match a field against a literal array with up to 100 values.
translation.Match string fields with SQL: Match string fields with SQL LIKE using escaped wildcards.
translation.No quota consumption in the: No quota consumption in the last {{count}} days
translation.Only the fields listed above: Only the fields listed above are accepted; unknown identifiers are rejected before SQL is built.
translation.Override Anthropic headers,: Override Anthropic headers, defaults, and thinking adapter behavior
translation.Password must be at least 8: Password must be at least 8 characters long
translation.Paste the full callback URL: Paste the full callback URL (includes code & state)
translation.Please manually copy and ope: Please manually copy and open the authorization link
translation.Prevent server-side request: Prevent server-side request forgery attacks by controlling outbound requests.
translation.Regex matches, arithmetic, f: Regex matches, arithmetic, function calls, and field-to-field comparisons are not supported.
translation.Regex matches, arithmetic, u: Regex matches, arithmetic, unsupported function calls, and field-to-field comparisons are not supported.
translation.Removes Midjourney flags suc: Removes Midjourney flags such as --fast, --relax, and --turbo from user prompts.
translation.Replace the timestamps with: Replace the timestamps with the start and end of your day.
translation.Request ID for tracing one c: Request ID for tracing one call.
translation.Required to expose Midjourne: Required to expose Midjourney-style image generation to end users.
translation.Review current version and f: Review current version and fetch release notes.
translation.Shortcut filters for the cur: Shortcut filters for the current or previous local day.
translation.Strings use double quotes, n: Strings use double quotes, numbers are integers, booleans are true or false, and nil can check null values.
translation.This record was written by a: This record was written by a pre-upgrade instance and lacks audit info. Upgrade the instance to record server IP, callback IP, payment method and system version.
translation.Tip: The generated key is a: Tip: The generated key is a JSON credential including access_token / refresh_token / account_id.
translation.Translate `-thinking` suffix: Translate `-thinking` suffixes into Anthropic native thinking models while keeping pricing predictable.
translation.Upstream provider request ID: Upstream provider request ID for tracing one call.
translation.Use date(...) for readable d: Use date(...) for readable day boundaries; add a timezone argument when needed.
translation.Use nil only with == or != t: Use nil only with == or != to check for null values.
translation.Use parentheses to group log: Use parentheses to group logic, for example not (model_name contains "embedding") && type == 2.
translation.Use special ratio for origin: Use special ratio for origin pricing
User ID that owns the log.
translation.Values are bound as SQL para: Values are bound as SQL parameters, and LIKE searches escape %, _, and ! characters.
translation.View and manage your API usa: View and manage your API usage logs
translation.View and manage your drawing: View and manage your drawing logs
translation.View and manage your task lo: View and manage your task logs
translation.View model call count analyt: View model call count analytics and charts
translation.View user consumption statis: View user consumption statistics and charts
translation.When a group has no availabl: When a group has no available channel, the system tries fallback groups in order. Pricing mode determines which group ratio is used for billing.
translation.When enabled, Midjourney cal: When enabled, Midjourney callbacks are accepted (reveals server IP).
translation.When enabled, source-group p: When enabled, source-group pricing uses the user special ratio for the source group if configured; otherwise it uses the source normal ratio.
